  "findings": [
    "ABS-to-PVC transition joined with incorrect solvent cement"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Cut out the non-compliant transition joints",
    "Reconstruct the transition using approved transition solvent cement (ASTM F493 or as permitted by local code) or approved mechanical transition couplings"
  ],
  "rationale": "The International Plumbing Code (IPC) and manufacturer listings prohibit joining ABS to PVC using standard PVC or ABS solvent cement. A specific transition cement (typically green, meeting ASTM F493) or an approved mechanical coupling must be used to ensure joint integrity and prevent leaks.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 705.26 (Joints between different piping materials)",
    "ASTM F493",
    "Manufacturer installation instructions"
  ]
